html:
Exclusive to:

The Glass Cutter is a craftable Weapon exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be crafted with 1 Log and 5 Moon Shards, doing so requires the player to be near a Lunar Altar or an Upgraded Celestial Orb and can be prototyped. It deals 68 damage per hit, the same as a Dark Sword, without any Sanity drain from wielding it. The Physical damage is increased by 25% when fighting weak Shadow Creatures (Crawling Horror, Terrorbeak and Lurking Nightmare).

The Glass Cutter's durability loss is halved when attacking Shadow Creatures, Shadow Merms, Maxwell's Shadow Puppets, Shadow Pieces, Reanimated Skeletons, Unseen Hands, Woven Shadows and Shadow Thralls, excluding the Nightmare Werepig. This means the Glass Cutter can be used a total of 150 times if it is used exclusively to attack shadows.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Terraprisma skin was introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's Terraria. Its rarity was Inspired - Elegant initially, but received change in August 19, 2022.
Woven - Elegant
An Eye for an Eye Collection
Terraprisma
Strike true with hallowed beauty.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Mystic Collection
Piercing Glass Cutter
It has an edge to it.

Tips

  • Bringing the Glass Cutter to the Ruins can work well for dealing with the Shadow Creatures during Nightmare phase or when insane. Survivors with a Lunar Aligned skill in their Skill Tree can boost up the Physical damage dealt with it.

Trivia

  • The Glass Cutter was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • Normally, Terraria's Terraprisma is summoned as a flying minion, therefore making the Glass Cutter's Terraprisma skin the only instance where the sword is ever used directly as a melee weapon.

"glasscutter"
“I'm not really cut out for fighting.”
–Wilson
“Haha, this thing could take an arm off!”
–Willow
“My new friend taught me how to make.”
–Wolfgang
“It visits death upon all who face it.”
–Wendy
“ORGANICS ARE WEAK TO SHARP EDGES”
–WX-78
“I like to get straight to the point.”
–Wickerbottom
“I feel pretty safe with it in my hand.”
–Woodie
“Sharp like my wit.”
–Maxwell
“T'will win any battle, surely!”
–Wigfrid
“It's sharp enough to split a spider hair.”
–Webber
“Good for slicing and dicing!”
–Warly
“Swoosh!”
–Wormwood
“Ha ha! Just try and fight me!”
–Winona
“Oh, I'm sure I'll have fun with this. Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Glorp! Sharp!”
–Wurt
“Moon sword!!”
–Walter
“The air around it tingles with potential.”
–Wanda
The Glass Cutter is a craftable Weapon exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be crafted with 1 Log and 5 Moon Shards, doing so requires the player to be near a Lunar Altar or an Upgraded Celestial Orb and can be prototyped. It deals 68 damage per hit, the same as a Dark Sword, without any Sanity drain from wielding it. The Physical damage is increased by 25% when fighting weak Shadow Creatures (Crawling Horror, Terrorbeak and Lurking Nightmare).
The Glass Cutter's durability loss is halved when attacking Shadow Creatures, Shadow Merms, Maxwell's Shadow Puppets, Shadow Pieces, Reanimated Skeletons, Unseen Hands, Woven Shadows and Shadow Thralls, excluding the Nightmare Werepig. This means the Glass Cutter can be used a total of 150 times if it is used exclusively to attack shadows.

Sharp! |walter = Moon sword!! |wanda = The air around it tingles with potential. }} The '''Glass Cutter''' is a craftable [[Weapon]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It can be crafted with 1 [[Log/DST|Log]] and 5 [[Moon Shard]]s, doing so requires the player to be near a [[Lunar Altars|Lunar Altar]] or an Upgraded [[Celestial Orb]] and can be prototyped. It deals 68 damage per hit, the same as a [[Dark Sword]], without any Sanity drain from wielding it. The Physical damage is increased by 25% when fighting weak Shadow Creatures ([[Crawling Horror/DST|Crawling Horror]], [[Terrorbeak/DST|Terrorbeak]] and [[Lurking Nightmare]]). The Glass Cutter's durability loss is halved when attacking [[Shadow Creatures]], [[Shadow Merm]]s, Maxwell's [[Shadow Puppet/DST|Shadow Puppets]], [[Shadow Pieces]], [[Reanimated Skeleton]]s, [[Ancient Fuelweaver|Unseen Hands]], [[Woven Shadow]]s and [[:Category:Shadow Thralls|Shadow Thralls]], excluding the [[Nightmare Werepig]]. This means the Glass Cutter can be used a total of 150 times if it is used exclusively to attack shadows. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Weapons Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Terraprisma''' skin was introduced in the ''[[An Eye for An Eye]]'' update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's ''Terraria''. Its rarity was '''Inspired - Elegant''' initially, but received change in August 19, 2022.
{{SkinInfo |image = Terraprisma Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = An Eye for an Eye Collection |name = Terraprisma |description = Strike true with hallowed beauty. |ingame = Terraprisma Wilson.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = Piercing Glass Cutter Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Mystic Collection |name = Piercing Glass Cutter |description = It has an edge to it. }}

Survivors with a Lunar Aligned skill in their [[Skill Tree]] can boost up the Physical damage dealt with it. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Glass Cutter was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Turn of Tides|Turn of Tides]]'' update. * Normally, [[wgg:terraria:Terraprisma|Terraria's Terraprisma]] is summoned as a flying minion, therefore making the Glass Cutter's Terraprisma skin the only instance where the sword is ever used directly as a melee weapon. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == |-| Piercing Glass Cutter= Piercing Glass Cutter Equipped.png|Equipped Piercing Glass Cutter Dropped.png|Dropped |-| = =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== File:Glass Cutter Blueprint.png|Unused Glass Cutter Blueprint Tools and Weapons= {{Tools and Weapons}} |-| Craftable Items= {{Craftable Items|tool}} [[vi:Glass Cutter]] [[zh:玻璃刀]] [[Category:Return of Them]] [[Category:Melee Weapons]] [[Category:Weapons]] [[Category:Celestial Filter]] [[Category:Equipable Items]] [[Category:Limited use]]
